tree.text: Someone I admire: My Uncle Tim

children.text: My uncle Tim is a great guy.
children.cn: 我的蒂姆叔叔是个很棒的人。

children.text: He was born in Halifax, England, in 1980.
children.cn: 他1980年出生在英格兰的哈利法克斯。

children.text: Now he lives and works in Cambodia.
children.cn: 现在他在柬埔寨生活和工作。

children.text: He worked in Manchester for a few years.
children.cn: 他在曼彻斯特工作了几年。

children.text: In 2014, he went to Cambodia to help people in small villages.
children.cn: 2014年，他去柬埔寨帮助小村庄的人们。

children.text: He uses a motorbike or a small plane to travel.
children.cn: 他使用摩托车或小飞机旅行。

children.text: He wants to stay in Cambodia because there is a lot of work.
children.cn: 他想留在柬埔寨，因为那里有很多工作。

children.text: He hopes to teach people to become doctors.
children.cn: 他希望教人们成为医生。

children.text: He is also getting married next year.
I admire him because he helps other people.
children.cn: 我崇拜他，因为他帮助别人。

children.text: He is happy to learn about another culture.
children.cn: 他很高兴了解另一种文化。
